---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits and how?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. If it's an API change, include the expected contract:

```http
POST /api/v1/...
{
  "field": "value"
}
```

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## Additional context

Mockups, references, related issues, or anything else relevant.
